name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 为此项目建议新功能
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement / 问题描述

<!-- 你的功能请求是否与某个问题相关？请描述。 / Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. -->
<!-- 例如：当 [...] 时我总是感到困扰 / Ex: I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution / 建议方案

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你希望发生的事情 / A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered / 已考虑的替代方案

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你考虑过的任何替代方案或变通方法 / A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. -->

1. 
2. 

## 🏪 Use Case / 使用场景

<!-- 描述这个功能会在什么场景下使用 / Describe the scenario where this feature would be used. -->

### User Story / 用户故事
<!-- 作为 [角色]，我希望 [功能]，以便 [价值] / As a [role], I want [feature], so that [value]. -->

## 📐 Technical Considerations / 技术考量

<!-- 如有技术方案雏形，可在此描述 / If you have a preliminary technical approach, describe it here. -->

- **Affected Components / 影响组件：** [e.g., Momo Agent, Data Pipeline, Face Recognition]
- **Dependencies / 依赖项：** [e.g., ZWF-20 middleware, OpenClaw 2026.4.x]
- **Estimated Complexity / 预估复杂度：** [Low / Medium / High]

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups / 界面原型

<!-- 如有界面设计草图或截图，可附于此 / If applicable, add mockups or screenshots. -->
